aboutPreview.title: Your Trusted Partner in Premium Chinese Snacks
aboutPreview.desc1: Three Squirrels Overseas Center specializes in bringing the finest Chinese snack delicacies to international markets. With over a decade of experience, we've built strong relationships with manufacturers and maintain rigorous quality control standards.
aboutPreview.desc2: From traditional favorites to innovative new flavors, we curate products that meet diverse global tastes while preserving authentic Chinese snack culture.

aboutPage.title: About Three Squirrels
aboutPage.storyText1: Three Squirrels Overseas Center was founded in 2012 with a singular vision: to share the rich tapestry of Chinese snack culture with the world. What began as a small export operation has grown into a trusted global partner serving distributors, retailers, and foodservice companies across 50+ countries.
aboutPage.storyText2: Our name draws inspiration from the industrious squirrel—symbolizing our commitment to carefully curating and delivering the finest snacks from China's diverse culinary landscape. Just as squirrels gather and preserve the best nature has to offer, we source, inspect, and deliver premium products that meet exacting international standards.
aboutPage.storyText3: Today, we manage over 500 product SKUs and work with more than 200 global partners. Our success is built on three pillars: unwavering quality, transparent partnerships, and a genuine passion for sharing authentic Chinese flavors.
aboutPage.missionText: To be the bridge between Chinese snack heritage and global consumers, delivering authentic flavors that delight taste buds while upholding the highest standards of quality, safety, and reliability.
aboutPage.visionText: To become the world's most trusted Chinese snack export partner, recognized for our product excellence, customer service, and contribution to introducing Chinese culinary culture to every corner of the globe.
aboutPage.journeySubtitle: Key milestones in our growth from a local startup to a global export leader.
aboutPage.certificationsSubtitle: We maintain the highest international standards for food safety and quality management.
aboutPage.teamSubtitle: Meet the experienced professionals driving Three Squirrels' global success.

timeline.2012: Foundation - Three Squirrels Overseas Center established in Hefei, Anhui, with a small team of 10 passionate food enthusiasts.
timeline.2015: First International Shipment - Expanded to serve our first international clients in Southeast Asia, marking the beginning of our global journey.
timeline.2017: European Market Entry - Successfully entered the European market with full FDA and EU compliance certifications.
timeline.2019: Product Line Expansion - Grew our product portfolio to over 300 SKUs and established partnerships with 100+ global distributors.
timeline.2022: 10th Anniversary - Celebrated serving 50+ countries with 500+ products and 200+ global partners across all continents.
timeline.2024: Innovation Center - Opened state-of-the-art product development center to create custom formulations for global partners.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.connectText: Whether you're interested in our products, exploring partnership opportunities, or have questions about our services, we'd love to hear from you.
contactPage.messagePlaceholder: Please tell us about your requirements, preferred products, estimated quantities, and any questions you may have...
contactPage.faqSubtitle: Quick answers to common questions about working with us.
contactPage.moqQuestion: What is your minimum order quantity?
contactPage.moqAnswer: Our standard MOQ varies by product, typically ranging from 200-1000 boxes. We offer flexible options for new partners - contact us to discuss your requirements.
contactPage.shippingAnswer: We ship via sea freight (FOB, CIF) for large orders and air freight for samples. We work with major shipping lines and can arrange door-to-door delivery to most destinations.
contactPage.customAnswer: Yes! We offer full custom branding services including logo design, packaging design, and custom flavors. MOQ for custom packaging starts at 1,000 boxes.
contactPage.certAnswer: We are certified with ISO 22000, FSSC 22000, HACCP, BRC, and FDA. Our facilities are also HALAL and KOSHER certified for applicable products.
contactPage.locationText:
Building A, Innovation Park
High-Tech Development Zone
Near Metro Line 2 - Aerospace Industrial Park Station
